LanguageData.VFEM2_MerchantGuild.description: These post-war traders are not a feudal guild but a loose network of caravan companies, brahmin drovers, guards, and deal-brokers who keep the wasteland moving. They abandon static lordships in favor of mobile camps, barter routes, and temporary markets, hauling scarce goods between isolated communities while armed escorts keep raiders honest.
LanguageData.VFEM2_MerchantGuild.label: caravan companies
